meaning: 奔巴岛[坦桑尼亚东北部]
examples: Dropping further along the African Plate, we arrive at Pemba, a tiny island just off the east coast of Africa.
More than 180 people drowned in the accident between the islands of Zanzibar and Pemba, many of them children.
Located about 35 kilometers from mainland Tanzania, Zanzibar consists of two main islands–Unguja and Pemba–plus numerous smaller islands.
In 1964, Tanganyika, Zanzibar and Pemba joined to form the United Republic of Tanganyika and Zanzibar.
However, the meeting last week in Pemba indicated that this could actually be possible.
